caption: A screen recording displays a Google Sheets spreadsheet titled "W 11/22/23 - 2023 Topps Museum Collection Basketball 6-Box V2 Case #2". The spreadsheet lists names like "Ron Wes" and "James C" alongside various numbers. A chat window on the right features messages, including one stating, "I think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can," and a bot message from Nightbot providing a link for the "BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE!" followed by a URL. At the bottom of the screen, a banner displays the website "WWW.JAEPYSCASEBREAKS.COM" and a logo for "CASEBREAKS.com" next to a small circular inset image of a man's face. As the video progresses, the focus shifts from the spreadsheet's general layout to a specific highlighted section of the name list, where "Ron Wes" and "James C" are selected and outlined in blue.
